Uses of Class
redis.clients.jedis.params.XClaimParams

  • Packages that use XClaimParams 
    Package Description
    redis.clients.jedis  
    redis.clients.jedis.commands
    This package contains the interfaces that contain methods representing Redis core commands.
    redis.clients.jedis.params
    This package contains the classes that represent optional parameters of core Redis commands.

    • Uses of XClaimParams in redis.clients.jedis

    • Uses of XClaimParams in redis.clients.jedis.params

      Methods in redis.clients.jedis.params that return XClaimParams 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      XClaimParams XClaimParams.force()
      Creates the pending message entry in the PEL even if certain specified IDs are not already in the PEL assigned to a different client.
      XClaimParams XClaimParams.idle(long idleTime)
      Set the idle time (last time it was delivered) of the message.
      XClaimParams XClaimParams.retryCount(int count)
      Set the retry counter to the specified value.
      XClaimParams XClaimParams.time(long idleUnixTime)
      Set the idle time to a specific Unix time (in milliseconds).
      static XClaimParams XClaimParams.xClaimParams()
